title: Chicken Pasta Bake
description: Creamy baked pasta with chicken, mozzarella, and a rich cream of chicken sauce. The ultimate comfort casserole.

ingredients.item: frozen peas or diced roasted red peppers

steps.instruction: Preheat oven to 375°F. Grease a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Cook pasta in salted boiling water for 2 minutes less than package directions. Drain and set aside.
In a large bowl, whisk together cream of chicken soup, chicken broth, sour cream, milk, garlic powder, Italian seasoning, and onion powder until smooth.
Add cooked chicken, drained pasta, and 1 cup of mozzarella to the sauce. Stir to combine thoroughly. Add peas or red peppers if using.
Season with salt and pepper. Pour into the prepared baking dish and spread evenly.
Top with remaining mozzarella and all of the Parmesan.
Cover with foil and bake for 25 minutes. Remove foil and bake an additional 10–15 minutes until bubbling and golden on top.
Let rest for 5–10 minutes before serving. The dish will firm up slightly as it rests.

notes: Cook the pasta slightly less than the package says — it will finish cooking in the oven and won't get mushy.
